rooms.name: The Waking Shore
rooms.description: You wake up on a cold, grey beach. The Mist clings to the ground like a living thing. Behind you, the infinite sea; ahead, the jagged cliffs of Oakhaven. Your journey to the heart of the Mist begins here.

rooms.name: Cliffside Path
rooms.description: A narrow path winding up the cliffs. The wind howls, carrying distant, unnatural screams. You see the ruins of a watchtower above.

rooms.name: The Broken Watchtower
rooms.description: Once a beacon of hope, now a hollowed shell. Rotting wood and rusted iron litter the floor. You find a discarded map showing the way to the Whispering Woods.

rooms.name: The Whispering Woods - Entrance
rooms.description: The trees here lean toward you, their leaves rustling even when there is no wind. The air tastes like copper.

rooms.name: Gloom Hollow
rooms.description: A low-lying part of the forest where the Mist is particularly thick. Glowing mushrooms provide the only light.

rooms.name: The Hunter's Camp
rooms.description: An abandoned camp. A fire still smolders, but there is no sign of the hunter. Only a bloody scrap of leather remains.

rooms.name: The Silent Clearing
rooms.description: A circle of white trees. Not a single bird sings here. In the center, a stone altar stained with time.

rooms.name: Spider's Web
rooms.description: Massive webs span between the trees. You can feel eyes watching you from the canopy.

rooms.name: The Weaver's Lair
rooms.description: The heart of the spider infestation. The Mist is sticky here. Something big moves in the shadows.

rooms.name: Eastwood Trail
rooms.description: A well-trodden path heading east towards the ruins of Oakhaven City.

rooms.name: The City Gates
rooms.description: The massive iron gates of Oakhaven lie off their hinges. Beyond them, a city of ghosts.

rooms.name: Market Square
rooms.description: The center of the city. Overturned stalls and broken glass crunch underfoot. A fountain in the center weeps black ichor.

rooms.name: The Cathedral of Light
rooms.description: A massive structure that once represented the city's faith. Now, its stained glass is shattered, and the Mist flows through its halls like a river.

rooms.name: The High Altar
rooms.description: The most sacred part of the Cathedral. A fallen angel's statue lies headless on the floor.

rooms.name: Merchant's Row
rooms.description: The wealthy district. The houses here are grand but hollow. You can hear the faint sound of gold coins clinking.

rooms.name: The Vaulted Cellar
rooms.description: A hidden cellar beneath a merchant's house. The air is stale and smells of old wine and secrets.

rooms.name: The Slums
rooms.description: The poorest part of Oakhaven. The buildings are leaning precariously, held together by rot and the Mist.

rooms.name: The Blackened Alley
rooms.description: A dark, narrow passage where the Mist seems to actively avoid the shadows. You feel a cold draft from the ground.

rooms.name: Entrance to the Sewers
rooms.description: A heavy iron grate leads down into the darkness. The smell is unbearable.

rooms.name: The Drenched Tunnels
rooms.description: Knee-deep in foul water. The echoes of your footsteps are answered by something splashing nearby.

rooms.name: The Great Cistern
rooms.description: A massive underground chamber. The water here is perfectly still, reflecting a sky that shouldn't exist.

rooms.name: The Alchemist's Lab
rooms.description: A secret workshop hidden in the sewers. Beakers and scrolls are scattered everywhere. You find a recipe for a 'Mist-Walker's Draught'.

rooms.name: The Sunken Library
rooms.description: Bookshelves line the walls, but most of the knowledge has been lost to the water. One book remains dry on a high pedestal.

rooms.name: The Forgotten Bridge
rooms.description: An ancient stone bridge crossing an underground river. The bridge looks like it might collapse at any moment.

rooms.name: The Crypt of Ancestors
rooms.description: The final resting place of the Oakhaven founders. The sarcophagi are open, their inhabitants long gone.

rooms.name: The Gate of Souls
rooms.description: A massive stone portal glowing with a faint blue light. Beyond it lies the Castle of the Mist Lord.

rooms.name: The Castle Courtyard
rooms.description: The Mist is so thick here you can barely see your own hands. The castle towers loom above like giants.

rooms.name: The Grand Staircase
rooms.description: Red carpet, now grey with dust, leads up to the throne room. Armor stands line the walls, their visors empty.

rooms.name: The Throne Room
rooms.description: The heart of the castle. A figure sits on a throne made of twisted shadow. The Mist Lord awaits you.

rooms.name: The Void Beyond
rooms.description: Behind the throne, a rift in reality. This is where the Mist comes from. You have reached the end of the world.
